rationale: The T010 defects are repaired, but optional same-product ingredients can consume a shared recipe stock pool before required lines, and the service query lacks explicit deterministic ingredient ordering. Required-first stable allocation is required before grocery/cooking reuse.

worker_package.objective: Complete the calculation repair: allocate each product/unit stock pool to non-optional recipe ingredients first, then expose residual optional coverage without changing output order; establish deterministic service ordering by group position, ingredient position, and stable ID; add regressions proving optional lines cannot deprive required lines and repeated reads are stable. Preserve all existing uncertainty, date, attribution, recipe-text, trusted-origin, and non-mutation behavior.
verify: pnpm exec vitest run --project unit tests/unit/pantry-availability.test.ts
stop_if: Repair requires schema/migration/grocery/cooking or files outside allowed_files.
Repair would count uncertain stock as exact, change response order, mutate batches, rewrite recipes, weaken attribution/origin checks, overwrite concurrent work, or require shared .next ownership.

missing_evidence: Required-first optional allocation and stable repeated-read regressions.
required_board_updates: Activate T013 repair and repeat calculation Judge before grocery/cooking.
